title: Star Wars (2015) 62
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 62}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 62}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars2015-62.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 62 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]] |penciller=[[Andrea Broccardo]] |inker=Andrea Broccardo |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=[[Gerald Parel]] |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[March 6]], [[2019]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/71188/star_wars_2015_62|text=Star Wars (2015) #62}} |pages=24 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=c. [[2 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 62 to around [[2 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=62 }} '''''Star Wars'' 62''' is the sixty-second issue of the [[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Kieron Gillen]], illustrated by [[Andrea Broccardo]], and published on [[March 6]], [[2019]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''THE SCOURGING OF SHU-TORUN: ROAD TO REVENGE! How is LEIA going to scourge SHU-TORUN? She'll need an all-star team…and a plan they won't see coming!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=THE SCOURGING OF SHU-TORUN
Part I |text=Queen Trios of Shu-Torun's betrayal allowed the evil Galactic Empire to launch a surprise attack against the Rebel Alliance's fleet, scattering the rebels and nearly crushing their heroic cause once and for all. Princess Leia Organa, Jedi-in-training Luke Skywalker and smuggler Han Solo narrowly escaped the assault and reunited with the Alliance thanks to the aid of new allies. Now, Leia has a score to settle with the Empire—and with Queen Trios....}} ==Plot summary== At the Rebel Command Center ''[[Home One]]'', Leia briefs her team on the plan to take down [[Shu-Torun]], a major Imperial resource site. Luke is eager for revenge against Queen Trios, but Leia clarifies the mission is a strategic strike, not a personal vendetta. She reveals that when they sliced into Trios's ship, they gained access to the full plans of Shu-Torun's infrastructure, which, despite its intricate design, is uniquely vulnerable. She assures the team that no civilians will be harmed, but they need a shape-shifter to help them with the mission. Meanwhile, on the Outer Rim world of [[Gralack]], the rebels find their man, [[Tunga Arpagion|Tunga]], at a theatrical performance. When [[stormtrooper]]s interrupt the show, believing it to be a treasonous performance, the rebels reveal their true identities to help Tunga escape. With Tunga now on their team, Leia decides they also need help from people who are used to fighting on a "hell world," and they travel to the planet [[Jedha]] to ask for the assistance of the [[Partisans]], led by [[Benthic]]. Though initially skeptical, Benthic agrees to help after Leia makes a compelling plea. While on Jedha, Luke visits the [[Temple of Central Isopter]], a location with a dark history. He explains to Han that he once trained there with a death cult but was ultimately nearly consumed by the [[Dark side of the Force|dark side]]. Back on the ''Home One'', Leia assembles her full team, which includes a former slicer named [[Meorti]], and explains their goal: to cripple the Empire's economy by striking Shu-Torun. Unbeknownst to the rebels, a group of Central Isopter devotees has also arrived on Shu-Torun, sensing a destructive Force energy similar to what they experienced on Jedha. ==Media==
